author: IGN RSS
text:
Spider-Man: Brand New Day Star Tom Holland Says He's Working to Bring Miles Morales Into the MCU
Tom Holland will soon return to the MCU for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, but he's already "working towards" a future where Miles Morales and his Peter Parker can swing side by side.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Marvel Tokon Developers Explain How They Made the Coolest Version of Magneto They Could | Evo 2026
At Evo 2026, we spoke with ArcSystem Works and Marvel Games to discuss Marvel Tokon's recent changes made in response to beta feedback, as well as the design process that went into creating their version of Magneto.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Christopher Nolan Says Mainstream Movies That 'Play It Safe' Should Take More Risks if They Want to Succeed
The Odyssey director Christopher Nolan has a word of advice for filmmakers working on mainstream movies: "The biggest risk of all is to play it safe."

author: IGN RSS
text:
Supergirl Fails to Take Flight With $68 Million Box Office Debut
Supergirl suffered a crash landing in theaters with a $68 million opening weekend at the global box office.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Sets Fall 2026 Release With First Look at 4 New Characters
Netflix has revealed first character details and a fall release window for its anime sequel series, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2.

author: IGN RSS
text:
The Invincible VS Devs Would Love a Mortal Kombat Crossover
The minds behind Invincible VS are open to collaborations with other genres and IPs, specifically welcoming potential characters from the Mortal Kombat franchise.

author: IGN RSS
text:
GTA 6 Scalpers Are Finding Buyers on eBay Despite Rockstar's Commitment to a Digital Release
Rockstar Games fans seem to be paying eBay scalpers extra for pre-order copies of GTA 6 – even if there isn't much of a reason to.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Street Fighter 6 Devs Have No Current Plans to Make Any Major Adjustments to System Mechanics | Evo 2026
We chat with Director Nakayama and Producer Matsumoto about the current state of Street Fighter 6 and what's in store for the future at Evo 2026.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Supergirl Director Credits James Gunn for Helping Choose Song for Much-Discussed Slow-Motion Fight Scene
Director Craig Gillespie says he credits DC Studios co-CEO James Gunn for helping choose the song used in the slow-motion Supergirl fight scene that has caused a stir on social media.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Steam Machine Scalpers on eBay Are Selling Reservations at Double the Price Valve Is Asking for
Valve has finally opened Steam Machine reservations, and like clockwork, scalpers have already taken to eBay to sell the new tech for more than double its retail price.
